ACCEPTED_DELIVER_DOCUMENT.message: Vrlo dobro. Prenio sam vam dokument.

ACCEPTED_DELIVER_MESSAGE.message: Izvrsno. Kopirao/la sam poruku na tvoje računalo.

ACCEPTED_PRIVATEER.message: Dobro. Mislim da ćeš vrlo brzo pronaći brod.

ACCEPTED_TRAITOR.message: U redu. Prenio sam podatke na računalo tvog broda.

ADTEXT_1.message: Pronađite osobu u sustavu {system}. Nagradite je novcem (cash).

DENY_1.message: Oprostite, gospodine, ali trebam pilota s više iskustva.

DISTANCE.description: Distance in space, between two locations

FAILUREMSG_1.message: Nisam zadovoljan tvojim radom. Neću ti platiti!

FAILUREMSG_2.message: Prekasno! Žao mi je, nećete biti plaćeni!

GREETING_DELIVER_DOCUMENT.message: Dovraga, uhvatio si me. U redu, potpisao sam dokument. Molim te, vrati ga {client}!

GREETING_DELIVER_MESSAGE.message: Hvala na poruci. Poslao sam odgovor za {client} na vaše brodsko računalo.

GREETING_EVACUATION.message: Bože, drago mi je vidjeti te! Možemo odmah poletjeti. Više me ništa ovdje ne zadržava.

GREETING_PRIVATEER.message: Uh, radite za {client}? Kopirao sam vrijedne podatke na vaše brodsko računalo. {client} će ovo smatrati korisnim!

GREETING_TAXI.message: O, ne. To su loše vijesti. Hajdemo se odmah vratiti.

GREETING_TRAITOR.message: Što? {client}  želi izjavu? U redu, molim vas vratite i predajte ovaj dokument!

HOW_MUCH_TIME_DELIVER_DOCUMENT.message: Molimo vas da se vratite do {date}.

HOW_MUCH_TIME_DELIVER_MESSAGE.message: Ako mi se ne javite do {date}, unajmit ću drugog pilota!

HOW_MUCH_TIME_EVACUATION.message: Morate se vratiti do {date}! Ako ne, u ozbiljnoj smo nevolji.

HOW_MUCH_TIME_PRIVATEER.message: Ako se ne vratiš do {date}, naša ponuda je završena!

HOW_MUCH_TIME_TRAITOR.message: Vrijeme je ključno! Ako se ne vratite do {date}, gotovi smo.

HOW_TO_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_FEMALE.message: Nađi njezin brod. Onda ćeš je naći.

HOW_TO_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_MALE.message: Sve što trebaš učiniti je pronaći njegov brod. Ne bi trebao biti daleko.

HOW_TO_DELIVER_MESSAGE_FEMALE.message: Sve što znam je da bi trebala raditi na svemirskoj postaji.

HOW_TO_DELIVER_MESSAGE_MALE.message: Radi u uredu blizu svemirske luke. To je sve što znam.

HOW_TO_EVACUATION_FEMALE.message: Sigurno će te kontaktirati ako sazna da si stigao/stigla!

HOW_TO_EVACUATION_MALE.message: Javit će ti se kad shvati da si stigao/stigla!

HOW_TO_PRIVATEER_FEMALE.message: Vrlo često uništava svoj brod tijekom opasnih misija. Radionica za svemirske brodove bila bi dobro mjesto za početak.

HOW_TO_PRIVATEER_MALE.message: On obavlja mnogo rizičnih putovanja. Njegov brod se često nalazi u radionici svemirske stanice.

HOW_TO_TAXI_FEMALE.message: Ne znam. To ovisi o tebi!

HOW_TO_TAXI_MALE.message: Nemam pojma. To je tvoja stvar!

HOW_TO_TRAITOR_FEMALE.message: Dobro je poznajući, druži se po barovima u blizini svemirskih luka.

HOW_TO_TRAITOR_MALE.message: Poznat je po tome što se zadržavao u krčmama svemirske luke.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_FEMALE_1.message: Pozdrav! Ja sam {client} i govorim u ime {company}. Jedan od naših brodova sudario se s drugim brodom samo nekoliko sekundi prije ulaska u hiperprostor. Nije bilo dovoljno vremena za zaustavljanje sekvence hiperskoka. Sada nam treba netko tko može locirati brod s identifikacijskim brojem {shipid} u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) i predati prijedlog za izvansudsku nagodbu zapovjedniku {wanted}. Molimo vas da se vratite u {domicile} radi isplate {cash}. Morat ćete putovati {dist} ly za ovo.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_FEMALE_2.message: Drago mi je. Zovem se {client}. Tražimo staru poslovnu partnericu koja nam još uvijek duguje uslugu. Zove se {wanted}. Skriva se u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Ako je možete pronaći, predajte joj šifrirani dokument i vratite ga u ured tvrtke {company} ovdje na adresi {domicile}. U slučaju uspjeha plaćamo {cash}. {system} je udaljen {dist}.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_FEMALE_3.message: Good day! I'm {client}. I represent {company} and we need help to track down a person in {system}. We bought her company last year but she is still in possession of some vital documents and has since relocated. Please track her down and have her hand over the documents. Her name is {wanted}, and she is somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_FEMALE_4.message: Good day! I'm {client} and I represent {company}. We need to have a document delivered to {wanted} in {system}. We also need to see it signed and returned to us at this location. We don't know her precise location but she is somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_MALE_1.message: Pozdrav! Ja sam {client} i govorim u ime {company}. Jedan od naših brodova sudario se s drugim brodom samo nekoliko sekundi prije ulaska u hiperprostor. Nije bilo dovoljno vremena za zaustavljanje sekvence hiperskoka. Sada nam treba netko tko može locirati brod s identifikacijskim brojem {shipid} u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) i predati prijedlog za izvansudsku nagodbu zapovjedniku {wanted}. Molimo vas da se vratite u {domicile} radi isplate {cash}. Morat ćete putovati {dist} ly za ovo.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_MALE_2.message: Drago mi je. Zovem se {client}. Tražimo starog poslovnog partnera koji nam još uvijek duguje uslugu. Zove se {wanted}. Skriva se u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Ako ga možete pronaći, predajte mu šifrirani dokument i vratite ga u ured tvrtke {company} ovdje na adresi {domicile}. U slučaju uspjeha plaćamo {cash}. {system} je udaljen {dist}.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_MALE_3.message: Good day! I'm {client}. I represent {company} and we need help to track down a person in {system}. We bought his company last year but he is still in possession of some vital documents and has since relocated. Please track him down and have him hand over the documents. His name is {wanted}, and he is somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_DOCUMENT_MALE_4.message: Good day! I'm {client} and I represent {company}. We need to have a document delivered to {wanted} in {system}. We also need to see it signed and returned to us at this location. We don't know his precise location but he is somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_FEMALE_1.message: Hi, my name is {client}. I'm looking for {relative}, {wanted}. She left the family in anger a few years ago. A friend of mine has seen her recently in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. I would like to see if she is ready for a reconciliation. I pay you {cash} if you can deliver a message to her and return to {domicile} with an answer. Please do it! Will you?

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_FEMALE_2.message: Hello. I'm {client}. I'm looking for {friend}. Her name is {wanted}. I know she resides in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, but I don't know her exact location. I will pay you {cash} if you can deliver a message to her.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_FEMALE_3.message: Hello. My name is {client}. I need to get in contact with {friend}, {wanted}. The last time I heard from her she was living in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, and I've heard she's still there but don't know precisely where. I will pay you {cash} if you can deliver a message to her.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_FEMALE_4.message: Hello. My name is {client}. {relative}, {wanted}, accepted a position in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system some years ago. After a year we stopped hearing from her and now the mail is being returned so something must have happened. My family will pay {cash} if you can track her down and deliver a message.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_FEMALE_5.message: Good day, I'm {client}! I need to get a message delivered to my professor, {wanted}, who is doing research in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. I haven't heard from her in six months, and the contact information I have is no longer valid. I'm prepared to pay {cash} for the service.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_MALE_1.message: Hi, my name is {client}. I'm looking for {relative}, {wanted}. He left the family in anger a few years ago. A friend of mine has seen him recently in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. I would like to see if he is ready for a reconciliation. I pay you {cash} if you can deliver a message to him and return to {domicile} with an answer. Please do it! Will you?

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_MALE_2.message: Hello. I'm {client}. I'm looking for {friend}. His name is {wanted}. I know he resides in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, but I don't know his exact location. I will pay you {cash} if you can deliver a message to him.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_MALE_3.message: Hello. My name is {client}. I need to get in contact with {friend}, {wanted}. The last time I heard from him he was living in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, and I've heard he's still there but don't know precisely where. I will pay you {cash} if you can deliver a message to him.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_MALE_4.message: Hello. My name is {client}. {relative}, {wanted}, accepted a position in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system some years ago. After a year we stopped hearing from him and now the mail is being returned so something must have happened. My family will pay {cash} if you can track him down and deliver a message.

INTROTEXT_DELIVER_MESSAGE_MALE_5.message: Good day, I'm {client}! I need to get a message delivered to my professor, {wanted}, who is doing research in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. I haven't heard from him in six months, and the contact information I have is no longer valid. I'm prepared to pay {cash} for the service.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_FEMALE_1.message: Hi. The {company} is in big trouble. Negotiations with an aggressive market competitor in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, a distance of {dist} ly, went very badly. Our envoy, {wanted}, must be evacuated. Communication with her is very limited, so we don't know her exact location. We pay {cash} for this run.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_FEMALE_2.message: Hello. Call me {client}. I'm employed by the {company}. Our sales representative, {wanted}, in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, distance {dist} ly, has come into conflict with some dangerous crooks. She doesn't trust the local authorities, so she's gone into hiding. We pay {cash} if you can find her and bring her back to {domicile} safely.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_FEMALE_3.message: Hello, I'm {client}. I represent {company}. We need to get one of our employees out of the {system} system immediately. I can't go into greater details due to security concerns, but there is a credible threat to her safety. She has gone into hiding at one of the spaceports in the system, but she was unable to safely tell us which one. Her name is {wanted}, and she's somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_FEMALE_4.message: Hello! My name is {client}. I have been reached by the news that {relative}, {wanted}, have been targeted by criminals and had to leave her home in a hurry. She is hiding somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, distance {dist} ly. The family wants to solve this discretely. We will pay {cash} if you can find her and bring her back to {domicile}.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_MALE_1.message: Hi. The {company} is in big trouble. Negotiations with an aggressive market competitor in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, a distance of {dist} ly, went very badly. Our envoy, {wanted}, must be evacuated. Communication with him is very limited, so we don't know his exact location. We pay {cash} for this run.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_MALE_2.message: Hello. Call me {client}. I'm employed by the {company}. Our sales representative, {wanted}, in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, distance {dist} ly, has come into conflict with some dangerous crooks. He doesn't trust the local authorities, so he's gone into hiding. We pay {cash} if you can find him and bring him back to {domicile} safely.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_MALE_3.message: Hello, I'm {client}. I represent {company}. We need to get one of our employees out of the {system} system immediately. I can't go into greater details due to security concerns, but there is a credible threat to his safety. He has gone into hiding at one of the spaceports in the system, but he was unable to safely tell us which one. His name is {wanted}, and he's somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system.

INTROTEXT_EVACUATION_MALE_4.message: Hello! My name is {client}. I have been reached by the news that {relative}, {wanted}, have been targeted by criminals and had to leave his home in a hurry. He is hiding somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, distance {dist} ly. The family wants to solve this discretely. We will pay {cash} if you can find him and bring him back to {domicile}.

INTROTEXT_PRIVATEER_FEMALE_1.message: Pozdrav! Zovem se {client}. Tražim {wanted}. Duguje mi puno novca. Prema posljednjim informacijama, obavlja misije u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Molim vas, recite joj da mi je strpljenje na izmaku. Vratite se u {domicile} po vašu uplatu {cash}.

INTROTEXT_PRIVATEER_FEMALE_2.message: Kako ste? Ja sam privatni istražitelj {client}. Moram pronaći gusarku {wanted} u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) i postaviti joj nekoliko pitanja. Njen brod ima registracijski broj {shipid}. Trenutno ne mogu napustiti {domicile} zbog drugog kaznenog slučaja. Stoga bih želio prepustiti ovaj zadatak nekome drugome. Platit ću {cash} za ovu misiju.

INTROTEXT_PRIVATEER_FEMALE_3.message: Hi there! My name is {client} and I need help to get a message through to {wanted} in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. She flies missions there and her ship is registered as {shipid}. I will pay you {cash} upon returning to {domicile} with an answer.

INTROTEXT_PRIVATEER_MALE_1.message: Pozdrav! Zovem se {client}. Tražim {wanted}. Duguje mi puno novca. Prema posljednjim informacijama, obavlja misije u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Molim vas, recite mu da mi je strpljenje na izmaku. Vratite se u {domicile} po vašu uplatu {cash}.

INTROTEXT_PRIVATEER_MALE_2.message: Kako ste? Ja sam privatni istražitelj {client}. Moram pronaći gusara {wanted} u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) i postaviti mu nekoliko pitanja. Njegov brod ima registracijski broj {shipid}. Trenutno ne mogu napustiti {domicile} zbog drugog kaznenog slučaja. Stoga bih želio prepustiti ovaj zadatak nekome drugome. Platit ću {cash} za ovu misiju.

INTROTEXT_PRIVATEER_MALE_3.message: Hi there! My name is {client} and I need help to get a message through to {wanted} in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. He flies missions there and his ship is registered as {shipid}. I will pay you {cash} upon returning to {domicile} with an answer.

INTROTEXT_TAXI_FEMALE_1.message: Bok. Ja sam {client}. Tražim rođakinju u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Zove se {wanted}. Vrijeme je ključno zbog medicinske hitnosti u obitelji. Molim vas, pronađite je i vratite je u {domicile}. Isplatit ću vam {cash}.

INTROTEXT_TAXI_FEMALE_2.message: Dobar dan. Ja sam procjenitelj osiguranja {client}. Dron za dostavu velikom brzinom nije uspio odrediti pravilan kurs, probio je prozor i ozbiljno oštetio antikni drveni namještaj u stanu. Srećom, nitko nije ozlijeđen. Ali do sada nismo uspjeli pronaći vlasnicu stana u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Stoga ću vam platiti {cash} ako je uspijete pronaći. Njena osobna prisutnost je potrebna za razjašnjenje zahtjeva.

INTROTEXT_TAXI_FEMALE_3.message: Hi. I'm {client}. I need help finding {relative}, {wanted}. I need you to bring her here as she's needed in the family company. We will pay you {cash} for the service. She's somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. Thank you!

INTROTEXT_TAXI_MALE_1.message: Pozdrav. Ja sam {client}. Tražim rođaka u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Zove se {wanted}. Vrijeme je ključno zbog medicinske hitnosti u obitelji. Molim vas, pronađite ga i vratite ga u {domicile}. Isplatit ću vam {cash}.

INTROTEXT_TAXI_MALE_2.message: Dobar dan. Ja sam procjenitelj osiguranja {client}. Dron velike brzine nije uspio odrediti pravilan kurs, probio je prozor i ozbiljno oštetio antikni drveni namještaj u stanu. Srećom, nitko nije ozlijeđen. Ali do sada nismo uspjeli pronaći vlasnika stana u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). Stoga ću vam platiti {cash} ako ga uspijete pronaći. Njegova osobna prisutnost je potrebna za razjašnjenje zahtjeva.

INTROTEXT_TAXI_MALE_3.message: Hi. I'm {client}. I need help finding {relative}, {wanted}. I need you to bring him here as he's needed in the family company. We will pay you {cash} for the service. He's somewhere in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system. Thank you!

INTROTEXT_TRAITOR_FEMALE_1.message: Pozdrav, moje ime je {client}. {wanted} se nije vratila s odmora na svoje radno mjesto u {company}. Zadnji put je viđena u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). {wanted} zna neke važne poslovne tajne. Stoga nam treba netko tko može dobiti nekoliko odgovora od nje o njezinoj trenutnoj odsutnosti. Za ovu misiju plaćamo {cash}. {system} se nalazi na udaljenosti od {dist} ly.

INTROTEXT_TRAITOR_FEMALE_2.message: Dobar dan. {company} traga za zaposlenicom koja je ukrala neke povjerljive dokumente. Njezino ime je {wanted}. Uprava je naziva izdajnicom, ali joj želi dati priliku da se predomisli i pokaje. Isplaćujemo {cash} ako je možete pronaći u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}), na {dist} udaljenosti, i dostavljamo joj poruku.

INTROTEXT_TRAITOR_FEMALE_3.message: Good day. I'm {client} of {company}. We're trying to find a former employee, {employee}, who worked on one of our latest projects. Her name is {wanted}. We pay {cash} if you can find her in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, {dist} ly distance, and deliver a message. Please be aware that she will not like this message.

INTROTEXT_TRAITOR_MALE_1.message: Pozdrav, moje ime je {client}. {wanted} se nije vratio s odmora na svoje radno mjesto u {company}. Zadnji put je viđen u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}). {wanted} zna neke važne poslovne tajne. Stoga nam treba netko tko od njega može dobiti nekoliko odgovora o njegovoj trenutnoj odsutnosti. Za ovu misiju plaćamo {cash}. {system} se nalazi na udaljenosti od {dist} ly.

INTROTEXT_TRAITOR_MALE_2.message: Dobar dan. {company} traga za zaposlenikom koji je ukrao neke povjerljive dokumente. Njegovo ime je {wanted}. Uprava ga naziva izdajnikom, ali mu želi dati priliku da se predomisli i pokaje. Isplaćujemo {cash} ako ga možete pronaći u sustavu {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}), na {dist} udaljenosti, i dostavljamo mu poruku.

INTROTEXT_TRAITOR_MALE_3.message: Good day. I'm {client} of {company}. We're trying to find a former employee, {employee}, who worked on one of our latest projects. His name is {wanted}. We pay {cash} if you can find him in the {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) system, {dist} ly distance, and deliver a message. Please be aware that he will not like this message.

MERCENARY_GREETING_FEMALE_1.message: Žao mi je. Tvoja smrt je moja stvar!

MERCENARY_GREETING_FEMALE_3.message: Želiš li upoznati {wanted}? Prvo ću te upoznati s tvojim stvoriteljem!

MERCENARY_GREETING_MALE_1.message: Nije ništa osobno. Ubit ću te za naknadu!

MERCENARY_GREETING_MALE_3.message: Želiš li upoznati {wanted}? Preko tebe mrtvog!

ON_BOARD.description: Status indicator showing if a passenger is currently onboard the player's ship.

PIRATE_ANSWER_1.message: Proslijedio/la sam vam odgovor za {client}. Doviđenja.

PIRATE_ANSWER_2.message: Molim te, proslijedi poruku koju ti trenutno prenosim {client}. Doviđenja.

PIRATE_ANSWER_3.message: Haha, molim te, reci ovom {client} da nemam što reći. Ugodan dan.

PIRATE_GREETING_1.message: Čuo sam da me tražiš. Imaš moju pažnju. Što želiš?

PIRATE_GREETING_2.message: U redu, shvatio/la si me. Ne gubi vrijeme i reci mi što želiš!

PIRATE_GREETING_3.message: Čuo sam da si mi trebao/trebala dati poruku?

PIRATE_TAUNTS_2.message: Dosta ovoga! Spremi se za pakao!

PIRATE_TAUNTS_3.message: Stvarno si prošao sav ovaj put da mi dostaviš ovu glupu poruku? Bolje da odeš odavde!

REPEAT_THE_REQUEST.message: Možete li, molim vas, ponoviti zahtjev?

RISK_EVACUATION_FEMALE_1.message: Situacija je napeta. Mislimo da je {wanted} u opasnosti.

RISK_EVACUATION_FEMALE_2.message: {wanted} je u ekstremnoj opasnosti. Trebala bi što prije napustiti sustav.

RISK_EVACUATION_MALE_1.message: {wanted} misli da bi trebao vrlo brzo napustiti sustav.

RISK_EVACUATION_MALE_2.message: {wanted} je u velikoj nevolji! Bolje da prije nego kasnije napusti sustav.

RISK_FEMALE_4.message: Možda. {wanted} ponekad može biti malo nagle naravi.

RISK_FEMALE_5.message: Po mom mišljenju, {wanted} je potpuno lud. Savjetujem ti da budeš oprezan!

RISK_MALE_2.message: Ne očekujem probleme. Ali tko zna?

RISK_MALE_3.message: Nisam siguran. On je znatiželjan tip.

RISK_MALE_5.message: O da, doista. {wanted} je manijak. Trebao bi biti spreman na sve!

STATUS.description: Label indicating the status display of a requested passenger.

SUCCESS_ATK_1.message: Što? Napao te je {wanted}? Molim te, prihvati ovaj novac kao odštetu!

SUCCESS_ATK_2.message: Stvarno? {wanted} te napao? Nevjerojatno! Što god. Prebacio sam novac.

SUCCESS_ATK_3.message: Upoznao/la si {wanted} i preživio/la? Super! Evo ti novac.

SUCCESS_INT_1.message: Čuo sam da si imao problema. Drago mi je da te ipak vidim. Platio sam ti u cijelosti.

SUCCESS_INT_2.message: Imali ste nesuglasice s plaćenikom? Pa, evo vaše odštete!

SUCCESS_INT_3.message: Upravo sam ti platio. Čuo sam da imaš plaćenika za vratom. Odlično!

SUCCESS_MSG_1.message: Hvala vam na ovoj usluzi. Platio/la sam naknadu.

SUCCESS_MSG_2.message: Hvala na usluzi. Vaša plaća je prebačena.

SUCCESS_MSG_4.message: Puno vam hvala! Platio sam vam u cijelosti.

SUCCESS_MSG_5.message: Pronašli ste {wanted}? Odlično! Evo vaše uplate.

TIP_FEMALE_1.message: Nisam siguran/sigurna, ali mislim da je {wanted} trenutno na stanici {station}.

TIP_FEMALE_2.message: Mislim da poznajem osobu koju tražite. Nedavno sam je vidio na {station}.

TIP_FEMALE_4.message: Mislim da poznajem osobu koja odgovara tvom opisu. Za više informacija posjeti {station}.

TIP_MALE_1.message: Mislim da je {wanted} trenutno na {station}. Ali nisam siguran/sigurna!

TIP_MALE_2.message: Mislim da znam {wanted}. Vidio sam ga na {station}.

TIP_MALE_3.message: Tražite {wanted}? Trenutno se nalazi na lokaciji {station}.

TIP_MALE_4.message: Tvoj opis odgovara osobi koju sam upoznao blizu {station}.

YOU_DO_NOT_HAVE_A_CABIN.message: Žao mi je, nemate putničku kabinu.
